title: Separator
description: Separator layer placed between the positive and negative electrodes to prevent short circuits while permitting ionic conduction.

name.description: Common material or product name, e.g. 'Celgard 2400', 'glass fibre', 'ceramic-coated PP'.

material_spec_id.description: Optional canonical IRI of a standalone material-spec for the separator base material.

structure.description: Physical layer structure of the separator membrane.

coating.description: Surface coating applied to the base membrane, e.g. 'Al2O3', 'SiO2', 'PVDF', 'ceramic'.

manufacturer.description: Name of the manufacturer or supplier.

property.description: Quantitative physical or electrochemical properties, e.g. thickness, porosity, Gurley number, ionic conductivity.
